objective:
Crée une stratégie rentable de scalping/swing court sur DOGE en timeframes courts (5min à 30min). 

Contraintes obligatoires :
- Priorité au Profit Factor élevé (> 1.3) et au contrôle du drawdown (max 25%)
- Stop-loss ATR obligatoire (1.5-2.5× ATR) et take-profit ATR (2-4× ATR)
- Pas d'overtrading : filtrer les trades avec ADX ou volatilité
- Favoriser des entrées précises (2-3 indicateurs max) plutôt qu'un grand nombre de trades
- Leverage 1-2× maximum

Indicateurs suggérés (au choix) : rsi, bollinger, ema, stochastic, atr, macd, supertrend, vortex

Le token est volatile et mean-reverting en timeframes courts — privilégier les retournements sur niveaux extrêmes plutôt que le trend-following pur.

iterations.hypothesis: The strategy exploits mean-reverting behavior in DOGE by identifying reversals at extreme RSI levels combined with Bollinger Band breakouts, using ADX to filter out trending markets and ATR for risk management.
Improving the strategy by adding a trend confirmation filter (Supertrend) and adjusting thresholds to reduce overtrading, increase win rate, and control drawdown.

Combining RSI for overbought/oversold signals with Bollinger Bands to capture mean reversion in Dogecoin, filtered by ADX to avoid whipsaws during ranging markets. Using ATR-based stop-loss and take-profit for controlled risk management.

iterations.hypothesis: Combining RSI for overbought/oversold signals with Bollinger Bands breaks can capture mean-reverting opportunities in DOGE, while controlling risk with ATR-based stop-loss and take-profit. ADX will filter out trades during low volatility or trending periods to avoid overtrading.

The strategy will capture short-term reversals in DOGE's volatile market by combining RSI for overbought/oversold levels with Bollinger Bands for volatility. ATR-based stop-loss and take-profit will manage risk effectively, while ADX filters out weak trends to reduce overtrading.
